queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating effect of having no checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: The influence of negative checking account balances on reducing credit risk exposure.
Credit risk drivers: The relationship between extended loan duration and decreased probability of borrower default.
